import.title: Bring your setup with you
import.description: XingYun AI can bring over existing settings and tools it finds before you start chatting.
import.scanning: Looking for existing XingYun AI settings and Claude Desktop tools...
import.scanFailed: Could not scan for existing setup.
import.emptyDescription: You can still set your XingYun API key and start fresh.

provider.title: Set up your XingYun API key
provider.description: XingYun AI connects only to the XingYun model service. Enter your API key to start using it.
provider.readyDescription: A XingYun API key is already configured. XingYun AI will use the XingYun model service for new chats.
provider.fixedProviderDescription: Only built-in model service · default model qwen3.6-plus
provider.apiKeyHelp: Your key is saved securely in local credential storage and used for XingYun AI API requests.
provider.saveFailed: Could not save the XingYun API key.
provider.selectFailed: Could not save default model settings.
provider.modelSyncTimeout: Model sync timed out. Please try again later.
provider.noAvailableModels: This API key has no available models. Check model permissions or use a different API key.
provider.modelRefreshWarning: Models could not be refreshed yet: {{message}}
provider.getKeyLink: Create one in the XingYun console
provider.groupHintIntro: When you create the token, pick the group that matches the models you want to use — this app is tuned for both:
provider.groupCodeMind: Mainly overseas models. Pick this if you use international providers.
provider.groupCodeMindChina: Mainly China-domestic models. Pick this if you use domestic providers.

tour.title: Ready to go
tour.description: XingYun AI is ready. Here is what is available now.
tour.readyWithModel: XingYun AI will start with {{model}}. You can switch models from Home whenever you need.

summary.defaultDescription: This is what XingYun AI will use when you start a new chat.
summary.extensionsDescription: Connected tools are available in Settings. Imported Claude Desktop tools stay off until you enable them.
summary.skillsDescription: Personal skills XingYun AI can see now. Project skills appear when you open a project.
